# Auditex public corpus

URL: https://auditex.hu/

Auditex is an open-source, read-only tenant audit evidence toolkit for Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace. It is built for local-first evidence capture, source-readable operation, and cautious tenant review.

URL: https://auditex.hu/privacy/

The Auditex privacy page explains website analytics, contact-path processing, and local-first app behaviour.

URL: https://auditex.hu/terms/

The Auditex terms page explains authorised use, local-first operation, support boundaries, and disclaimers.
